title: Fourth Species Above the Fux Dorian Cantus
objective: Syncopated counterpoint above the Fux Dorian cantus, exploiting its descending segments for true descending 7-6 suspension chains.
prompt: V1 is the cantus. V0 rests on beat 0, then attacks a duration-1 note on every half-beat, sustaining across downbeats with '-' cells. Half-beat attacks must be consonant. Where the cantus descends (beats 6 through 10), chain 7-6 suspensions: each sixth, held while the cantus steps down, becomes a seventh that resolves down by step to the next sixth. Cadence with the 7-6 into C# and close on the final octave.
success_criteria: Every row remains strict parser-valid MidGrid.
V1 cantus remains unchanged, including hold cells.
V0 attacks only on half-beat rows (plus the final note at beat 10), sustaining across downbeats.
Half-beat attack intervals are consonant; dissonant downbeats resolve down by step.
The descending cantus segment carries a 7-6 chain.
Corrected solution has no evaluator errors.

interval_rules.label: Fourth-species preparations and resolutions must be consonant
